name: ustation-app-shell
description: U-Station 纯 WebView 壳（Capacitor 仅生成 Android 工程，无 Cordova / 无 JS Bridge）

scripts.patch:android: node scripts/patch-strip-cordova.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-network.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-webview.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-gradle-deps.mjs && node scripts/finalize-android-production.mjs
